text: Transformers is a library developed by Hugging Face that provides thousands of pretrained models for natural language processing, computer vision, and audio tasks. It supports PyTorch, TensorFlow, and JAX frameworks.

A pipeline in Transformers is a high-level API that abstracts away the complexity of preprocessing, model inference, and postprocessing. You can create one with: from transformers import pipeline; pipe = pipeline('text-generation', model='gpt2').

FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) is a library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors. It is widely used in retrieval-augmented generation systems to index and query document embeddings.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines a retriever that fetches relevant documents from a knowledge base with a generator that produces answers conditioned on both the query and retrieved context.
LangChain is a framework for building applications with large language models. It provides tools for chaining LLM calls, managing prompts, integrating vector stores, and building retrieval pipelines.
